description: Equipment collateral schedule with borrowing base values
parsed_text:
COLLATERAL SCHEDULE
Schedule Date: March 15, 2026
Borrower: Prairie Ridge Manufacturing LLC
Secured Party: Heartland Bank, N.A.
Reference: Security Agreement dated March 15, 2026
Collateral Category: Equipment
Collateral Description: CNC machines, tooling, and related manufacturing equipment located at 4100 Foundry Road, Des Moines, Iowa.
Total Collateral Value: $5,900,000
Eligible Collateral Value: $5,000,000
Advance Rate: 85.0%
Borrowing Base Amount: $4,250,000
Appraisal Date: February 20, 2026
Valuation Method: Desktop equipment appraisal
Lien Position: First priority
Prior Liens: $0
Insurance Required: Yes
Perfection Method: UCC filing and title lien where applicable
Items: EQ-001 Haas VF-6 CNC Mill serial H66210 value $950,000 location Des Moines; EQ-002 Mazak Integrex serial MZ8842 value $1,200,000 location Des Moines

expected_json.collateral_description: CNC machines, tooling, and related manufacturing equipment located at 4100 Foundry Road, Des Moines, Iowa.
